serverInfo.name: bitcoin
serverInfo.description: MCP server for Bitcoin — 43 tools for AI agents to save money on fees. Zero config, works out of the box.

tools.name: get_blockchain_info
tools.description: Get Bitcoin blockchain overview: chain, block height, sync progress, difficulty, pruning, and active softfork deployments.

tools.name: get_block_count
tools.description: Get the current block height (number of blocks in the longest chain).

tools.name: get_node_status
tools.description: Get comprehensive Bitcoin node status: version, network, sync state, mempool, connections, and relay fees.

tools.name: get_peer_info
tools.description: Get connected peer details: addresses, versions, latencies, and data transferred.

tools.name: get_network_info
tools.description: Get network-level info: protocol version, connections, relay fees, and local addresses.

tools.name: get_mining_info
tools.description: Get mining info: difficulty, network hashrate, and current block template size.

tools.name: get_mining_pool_rankings
tools.description: Get estimated mining pool rankings from recent blocks.

tools.name: get_chain_tips
tools.description: Get information about all known chain tips including orphaned branches.

tools.name: get_chain_tx_stats
tools.description: Get transaction statistics over a window of blocks.

tools.name: get_utxo_set_info
tools.description: Get UTXO set statistics: total UTXOs, total BTC, and disk size.

tools.name: analyze_block
tools.description: Analyze a Bitcoin block by height or hash.

tools.name: get_block_stats
tools.description: Get detailed statistics for a block.

tools.name: search_blocks
tools.description: Search recent blocks for notable patterns.

tools.name: analyze_mempool
tools.description: Analyze the Bitcoin mempool: size, fees, and congestion.

tools.name: analyze_next_block
tools.description: Preview what the next mined block might look like.

tools.name: get_mempool_info
tools.description: Get raw mempool statistics.

tools.name: get_mempool_entry
tools.description: Get mempool entry details for a specific transaction.

tools.name: get_mempool_ancestors
tools.description: Get unconfirmed parent transactions of a mempool transaction.

tools.name: analyze_transaction
tools.description: Analyze a Bitcoin transaction by txid.

tools.name: decode_raw_transaction
tools.description: Decode a raw transaction hex string.

tools.name: send_raw_transaction
tools.description: Broadcast a signed raw transaction to the Bitcoin network.

tools.name: get_fee_estimates
tools.description: Get fee estimates for different confirmation targets.

tools.name: estimate_smart_fee
tools.description: Get Bitcoin Core's fee estimate for a specific confirmation target.

tools.name: compare_fee_estimates
tools.description: Compare fee estimates across multiple confirmation targets.

tools.name: get_fee_recommendation
tools.description: Get a simple fee recommendation based on current mempool conditions.

tools.name: estimate_transaction_cost
tools.description: Estimate the cost of a transaction in sats and USD.

tools.name: check_utxo
tools.description: Check if a specific UTXO is unspent.

tools.name: explain_script
tools.description: Decode a Bitcoin Script hex and break down the opcodes.

tools.name: get_address_utxos
tools.description: Scan the UTXO set for all unspent outputs belonging to an address.

tools.name: validate_address
tools.description: Validate a Bitcoin address and return its type.

tools.name: get_difficulty_adjustment
tools.description: Calculate difficulty adjustment progress.

tools.name: compare_blocks
tools.description: Compare block statistics between two block heights.

tools.name: search_blockchain
tools.description: Search for blocks, transactions, or addresses.

tools.name: get_btc_price
tools.description: Get current BTC/USD price from CoinGecko.

tools.name: get_supply_info
tools.description: Get Bitcoin supply data: circulating supply, inflation rate, halving countdown.

tools.name: get_halving_countdown
tools.description: Get countdown to the next Bitcoin halving.

tools.name: get_market_sentiment
tools.description: Get Bitcoin Fear & Greed Index.

tools.name: decode_bolt11_invoice
tools.description: Decode a BOLT11 Lightning invoice.

tools.name: generate_keypair
tools.description: Generate a new Bitcoin address via the connected node's wallet.

tools.name: get_situation_summary
tools.description: Get a comprehensive Bitcoin network situation summary.

tools.name: describe_rpc_command
tools.description: Get help text for a specific Bitcoin Core RPC command.

tools.name: list_rpc_commands
tools.description: List all available Bitcoin Core RPC commands.

tools.name: query_remote_api
tools.description: Query a remote Satoshi API instance.

resources.name: Connection Status
resources.description: Connection status: mode, network, and whether connected.

prompts.name: analyze_fee_environment
prompts.description: Analyze the current Bitcoin fee environment.

prompts.name: monitor_mempool_fees
prompts.description: Monitor mempool and alert on fee changes.

prompts.name: network_health_report
prompts.description: Generate a comprehensive network health report.

prompts.name: track_transaction
prompts.description: Track a transaction from mempool to confirmation.
